New Zealand's Trusted Provider of Furniture and Appliance Rental Solutions for over 20 years.

Whether it's appliance rentals, furniture rentals, or any product you are wanting to rent — Mr. Rental has you covered.

With same day approval on most applications, and next day delivery to most locations, we make it super quick and easy.

The Mr. Rental range of products has the solution to suit your budget and lifestyle.

); } /* FITNESS PAGE */ function FitnessPage() { const products = [ { name: "Exercise Bike", price: "$14.00", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1591741547934-8d7c16ff8e3b?auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80", desc: "Fitness bike with adjustable resistance and comfortable seating.", }, { name: "Programmable Exercise Bike", price: "$17.00", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1571019613914-85f342c6a11e?auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80", desc: "Exercise bike with multiple workout programs for home use.", }, { name: "Treadmill", price: "$22.00", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1576678927484-cc907957088c?auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80", desc: "Treadmill with speed and incline controls for cardio training.", }, { name: "Premium Treadmill", price: "$29.00", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1596357395217-80de13130e92?auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80", desc: "Premium treadmill with stronger motor and larger running surface.", }, { name: "Cross Trainer", price: "$18.00", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517963879433-6ad2b056d712?auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80", desc: "Compact cross trainer for full body home workouts.", }, { name: "Programmable Cross Trainer", price: "$23.00", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1593079831268-3381b0db4a77?auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80", desc: "Programmable cross trainer with multiple resistance settings.", }, { name: "Rower", price: "$15.00", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1599058917212-d750089bc07e?auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80", desc: "Compact rowing machine for cardio and endurance training.", }, { name: "Premium Rower", price: "$19.00", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1599058918144-1ffabb6ab9a0?auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80", desc: "Premium rower with smooth resistance and advanced workout options.", }, ]; const [openFaq, setOpenFaq] = useState(0); return ( <>
